title: Robot Pick And Place
description: A robotics-style task: acquire an object if not already holding one, carry it to the target, and place it. Grasping retries until it succeeds.

custom_nodes.name: IsHoldingObject
custom_nodes.title: Is Holding Object?
custom_nodes.description: Succeeds if the gripper currently holds the object.

custom_nodes.name: MoveToObject
custom_nodes.title: Move To Object
custom_nodes.description: Plans and executes a motion to the object's pose.

custom_nodes.name: GraspObject
custom_nodes.title: Grasp Object
custom_nodes.description: Closes the gripper on the object.

custom_nodes.name: MoveToTarget
custom_nodes.title: Move To Target
custom_nodes.description: Carries the object to the target location.

custom_nodes.name: PlaceObject
custom_nodes.title: Place Object
custom_nodes.description: Releases the object at the target pose.

n2.name: Priority
n2.title: Ensure Holding Object
n2.description: Skip acquisition if the object is already held.
